changes.summary: Optional block for function-based integration actions whose category contains function data action.
Optional and computed description of the function.
Optional and computed handler function name.
Optional and computed runtime environment for the function.
Optional and computed function execution timeout in seconds.
Optional and computed ID of the uploaded zip file containing function code.
Required path to the zip file containing function code when using function_config for create or update.
No longer required; now optional and computed.

Function data action categories are created through a draft-and-publish workflow that uploads function_config.file_path, applies function settings, and publishes the draft; file_path is required for these actions.
Function data action categories use the draft workflow on update to upload an updated zip and publish changes.
Read refreshes function_config from the API when the action category is a function data action.
Consistency state validation is no longer performed on refresh, which may surface plan diffs that were previously suppressed.
Create, read, update, and delete API calls honor a configurable delay when ROUTING_QUEUE_DELAY_MAX is set.
Lookup by name filters surveys by name through the provider proxy instead of paging all surveys, fixing incorrect name resolution.
Optional environment variable that sets a maximum delay in seconds before routing queue API operations.
